programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from Last Chance Kitchen on who should return to the competition. Then the chefs take off in a Quickfire with Padma and Jonathan Waxman making a two-course Business-Class dish for an airline. For their final challenge in Los Angeles before jetting off to Italy for the finale, the chefs go to Michael’s Santa Monica, where they meet Chef and Restaurateur Michael McCarty, the legendary pioneer of California Cuisine. With only five chefs moving onto the finals, the chefs will have to reimagine one of Michael’s iconic dishes from across the years and serve it to a table of celebrated alumni of Michael’s kitchen, including Roy Yamaguchi, Jonathan Waxman, Sang Yoon, Mark Peel and Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In a Top Chef first, the final five travel to one of the top culinary destinations in the world - Italy. First the chefs must make an apertivo for 30 locals from the town of Lucca that pairs perfectly with a Peroni beer. Then, they have the experience of a chef’s lifetime, hunting the elusive white truffle which they must use in a dish for a Tuscan food festival. There’s no room for error, as the chefs are making dishes for not just Tom, Padma and Gail but avant-garde Italian Chef Cristiano Tomei, Truffle expert Cristiano Savini and a host of locals.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When all the Westley Kids but Philly Phil get invited to a popular kid's party Philly Phil becomes determined to figure out exactly what it is about popular kid behavior that he doesn't grasp. The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails. Surprisingly Philly Phil's plan seems to work... that is until things start backfiring when BROC begins treating Philly Phil as a social liability and starts scoring popularity points at Philly Phil's expense.

programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Rivers are lifelines in Wild Portugal, connecting mountains to the sea. Discover the Deer stag, frogs' spring rituals, and Grebes' dances, along with other animals and landscapes along these vital waterways.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Portugal’s coastal waters and the Azores archipelago boast rich ecosystems. Explore the diverse species living in these waters and discover their unique lives in this revealing episode.

programme.title: Attenborough's Life in Colour
programme.desc: Millions of years ago, the first animals had eyes that were unable to distinguish color -- yet as that changed, ‘seeing in color’ gave animals many advantages, whether to find food, attract a mate or warn off an enemy.

programme.title: Attenborough's Life in Colour
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals some of the natural world’s most cunning tricksters and masters of disguise. Discover how some animals use color to hide and disappear into the background, or to trick and deceive.

programme.title: Attenborough's Life in Colour
programme.desc: Find out the stories behind the scientific research on animal colors - from robotic frogs wrestling with real-life counterparts, to spiders wearing eyeliner to attract mates.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: It takes patience and commitment for The Rhino Orphanage, as they nurture young rhinos whose mothers have been lost to poaching.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Portugal’s coastal waters and the Azores archipelago boast rich ecosystems. Explore the diverse species living in these waters and discover their unique lives in this revealing episode.

programme.title: Gameplay: The Story of the Videogame Revolution
programme.desc: Gameplay is a feature on the history of videogames. From Pong to Pac Man, Super Mario to Lara Croft, Doom, Grand Theft Auto and beyond, we chronicle the remarkable story of the fastest evolving new media of all time.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the foundations of Cryptocurrency and talk to the local crypto pioneers who risked it all.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: Now we know why Crypto is such a big deal, through this episode we’ll meet the family behind one of NZ’s biggest Crypto success stories. We’ll dispel some crypto myths and cover the basics of how to get on board.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: CEO Aaron McDonald and Co-Founder Brooke Howard-Smith tell us how they created a multi-million dollar NFT business here in Aotearoa and are collaborating with international superstars.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: It takes patience and commitment for The Rhino Orphanage, as they nurture young rhinos whose mothers have been lost to poaching.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The two oldest rhinos are set to be released back into the wild. Three rhinos cause a stir as they go missing, while the younger rhinos make steady progress toward health and happiness.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The poaching crisis intensifies and poachers turn their attention to orphanages. After losing her mother, four-week-old Jamila finally finds sanctuary at The Rhino Orphanage.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw discovers a host of delights in Japan. On the wintry northern island of Hokkaido, he samples sea urchin, pond smelt and boutique cheesecake.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam goes to sea with the fishermen who caught the so-called `million-dollar tuna'. He also meets a soy sauce maker who saved his staff from the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary tour of Japan, preparing fresh sushi and taking a trip to his wife's hometown to indulge in a little home cooking.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary pilgrimage in Japan, devouring some of the finest miso, Nagoya chicken and Wagyu beef, and meeting a 74-year-old abalone diver.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In the vast urban sprawl of Tokyo, Adam Liaw explores a food culture that not only sustains the `salaryman' workers in style but retains culinary traditions.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw checks out the restaurants of food-crazy Tokyo and taste's some interesting dishes including Yakitori made from the reproductive organs of chickens.

programme.title: Artist to Icon

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: In Chile's Torres del Paine melt from snow-covered mountains feeds finger-like fjords as they reach out to the sea to join the current lowering its salinity. programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Grug wants a day off from his honey-do-list so he subs in doppelganger Gurg/Eep and Thunk set out to sabotage Bulk and Sulk's "idea fair" project because they always win even though Snoot comes up with the ideas.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Thunk babysits Sandy and new baby Cliff to prove his responsible. Cliff is a jerk and keeps getting Sandy in trouble/Gran worries that Thunk isn't tough enough to survive to adulthood because he likes to hang out with old people, so she puts him through a series of toughness tests.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When the adults come down with the sneezles, the kids (including Lerk and Womp) use the chance to create their own society ("you-topia") with no rules, but Eep and Thunk disagree on how to run it/Food is scarce and when a large egg is spotted on the hunting field, Grug, Eep, Snoot, Munk and Squawk call dibbs. It's decided that whoever is tough enough to be the last holding on, wins the food.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Thunk invents ventriloquism when he tries (and fails) at stand-up comedy, but he gets jealous when Ahhh! Valley thinks the puppet is the real comedian/Eep is determined for two buffalippos to find love when Grug denies her dating privileges.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep takes up death-guarding at the watering hole, but finds out it's more mundane than she thought. Valley believes her. Thunk tries to overcome his fear of thunderstorms.

programme.desc: New girl in town Felicia shows off her robo-dog but it runs out of control, and TZG must secretly stop the barking bot from wreaking havoc. / When Lula starts gathering birthday wishes from folks around town, TZG secretly keeps her surprise party under wraps.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Mr. Pea helps the Veggies face their fears in an overnight boot camp/Bob and Petunia try to encourage Ichabeezer to stay when he wants to move out

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: LarryBoy and Junior No-pack must investigate when Junior's jetpack is missing/Bob gets jealous when Larry calls Bacon Bill his BFF

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie’s pet crab goes into a cave, Kelp uses his knowledge of crabs under the sea to coax him out using dance and rhythm. / Scallop’s special shell is broken, but Kelp transforms the broken bits into something even more special.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes two little containers of popcorn and two movie tickets, it’s movie night in the dollhouse! Demanding Director CatRat leads the Gabby Cats through a Gabby-fied version of a classic story, Gabby-locks and the Three Bears.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Pete the Polar Bear shows up for a vacation on MerCat’s sunny beach. Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats show Pete he can have a great vacation, even if things don’t go precisely to plan.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: After Magnus accuses Cutter of setting fires near the village that could hurt the sheep, the Riders have to put them out and find the real culprit.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When accident-prone Rodney gets hired to babysit a mischievous toddler, TZG secretly watches over their safety. / When there’s a power outage in Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly helps the townsfolk beat the blackout.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Phoebe’s Gratitude Day card flies away before she can give it to Marcus, the Dews try to help her recreate it - perfectly. But they learn that you don't have to be perfect to show your gratitude for someone. / When Athena finds herself a little short-handed at the Fairhaven Summer Fair, her cousin, Reed, comes to help; only to give Athena more problems to fix.

programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: When Tag volunteers to be Mayor for the day, she promises everyone an ice cream party. But as she tries to do everything herself, the party plans begin to fall apart. Until Tag realizes that being a great Mayor means knowing when to ask for help. / Comic book villains Flea and Thunder (aka Frank and Beans) have teamed up with a Wicked Chicken to cause chicken-related havoc on Pawston. Heroes Chaser and Chewer (aka Tag and Scooch), team up with Flora Fedora (Lady Lydia) to save the town.

programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: Tag becomes jealous when Yip prefers to spend time with puppy-sitter Beans instead of with her. Determined to win Yip back, Tag enlists the help of Cheddar Biscuit, Gilber, Spike and Frank to try and win him back. / Frank and Beans find out that Tag and Scooch are trying to get into the Doggy Book of World Records and sabotage every attempt. When Tag and Scooch find out what the sneaky duo are up to, they come up with a plan to outsmart them.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp has a new trick with his bubbles: he can have his friends put voice messages inside that you hear when you pop them. But when Pixie decides she doesn’t want the others to hear what’s in her bubble, the chase is on to rescue it! / Juniper is devastated when the traditional ceremony to celebrate her next level of spark achievement can’t happen. Kelp helps introduce a new tradition.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp writes a song about him and Scallop to perform at the unicorn show. But when it comes time, Scallop wants to keep the song “just for them”, leaving Kelp to come up with anew act- and fast! / The kids all visit the magical musical plant greenhouse on Unicorn Land. They each pick a plant to take care of, and for Kelp it’s a sad, almost dead plant that he falls in love with.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Aggro is embarrassed about big changes she's going through. And when she gets stuck in a volcano, the Rescue Riders seek help from ... Magnus?

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When a mama Ironclaw dragon gets caught high on a mountain with a broken wing, Hannahr the blacksmith has to confront her fear of heights to help out.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Dozer and Skya work together to find their way home after they are attacked by Shockarachnids, jumper-cable-like snakes with high-voltage bites

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When Aunt Cora throws a career day at school, Lucky struggles to figure out what she wants to be when she grows up.

programme.title: Cleopatra in Space
programme.desc: Khepra, leader of the Cat Council, takes Cleo, Akila and Callie on a "Ladies' Night Out" at the arcade. Cleo hates it until Khepra picks a fight with some aliens. Then at least there's kicking.

programme.title: Cleopatra in Space
programme.desc: Brian and Akila get trapped inside this weird planet and Brian reprograms a broken Xerx robot and basically, it's like it's their baby. They have to raise it real fast so it can save them from fire monsters and junk.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Thunk babysits Sandy and new baby Cliff to prove his responsible. Cliff is a jerk and keeps getting Sandy in trouble/Gran worries that Thunk isn't tough enough to survive to adulthood because he likes to hang out with old people, so she puts him through a series of toughness tests.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When the adults come down with the sneezles, the kids (including Lerk and Womp) use the chance to create their own society ("you-topia") with no rules, but Eep and Thunk disagree on how to run it/Food is scarce and when a large egg is spotted on the hunting field, Grug, Eep, Snoot, Munk and Squawk call dibbs. It's decided that whoever is tough enough to be the last holding on, wins the food.

programme.title: Dragons: Defenders of Berk
programme.desc: Hiccup and the gang start a secret club to prepare for the Outcast offensive.

programme.title: Dragons: Defenders of Berk

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom sets out to prove Sledkin caused an explosion that injured a dragon in the Hidden World.

programme.title: Two Days and One Night 4
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the "2 Days and 1 Night" casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: The Return of Superman
programme.desc: Parenting challenges of "Superman" , the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then…

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Robot Apocalypse
programme.desc: When expert hacker Tara tries to stop a powerful and sentient A.I. from taking over the world's military, the A.I. marks her as a terrorist who must be exterminated…

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun is a skilled martial arts master who left the martial arts world to protect his lover. However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover’s death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Hong Kong action cinema is famous for its real kung fu moves performed by a group called “Kung Fu Stuntmen”. This docu-film pays tribute to the generations of kung fu stuntmen, with the crew spending over two years digging archives and interviewing many talents, including the most prominent masters like Jackie Chan, Donnie Yen and Sammo Hung.

programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece prepares a pasta version of paella, a traditional Spanish dish, and gives it a Southern mac-and-cheese twist.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca score a lead on an unlisted property located in a sought-after neighbourhood in Austin. However, excitement soon turns to panic when they discover that the entire house is a junkyard.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca hike up their favourite nature trail to get a bird's-eye view of a potential flip in the community of Wimberley, Texas, which is known for its big-city wealth and small-town charm.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: With the power of spirit behind Theresa, her journey giving the ultimate gift of peace continues. A touching follow-up message from a podcast reading confirms Theresa's lasting impact on those in need.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex’s success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: My Child Has my Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.

programme.title: I Thought my Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: Wife and expectant mother Lola seems to have it all: the big house, a dashing husband, and a thriving restaurant. But Lola's perfect life is interrupted when a ghost from the past suddenly shows up.

programme.desc: Rachael show how to take that favourite summer staple of grilled corn on the cob to a whole new level by combining it with spicy chilli and more, with her recipe for Mexican street-corn pasta.

programme.desc: Alfonso explores treats with serious pop, like Big League Chew bubblegum.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0 (S3)
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores little treats with big flavor.

programme.title: Chef Boot Camp (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks sends struggling chefs from restaurants across America on a gruelling boot camp to prove they deserve to keep running their kitchens.

programme.title: Hot Dish with Franco (S1)
programme.desc: Franco Noriega recreates the meal that made him fall in love with New York City, featuring steak frites, lemony asparagus and an ooey-gooey cookie.

programme.title: Ayesha's Home Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Ayesha Curry starts new family food traditions by making Peanut Butter and Jelly French Toast with her sister, Maria, and a Healthy Green Juice for her husband, Stephen.

programme.title: Guy's Ultimate Game Night (S1)
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes some of his favorite folks to play with their food in a whole new way!

programme.title: Man V. Food (S4)
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza.

programme.title: Man V. Food (S4)
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties.

programme.title: Cheap Eats (S4)
programme.desc: Ali Khan goes all in on a wickedly good day of eating in the desert.

programme.title: Cheap Eats (S4)
programme.desc: Ali grabs bacon-wrapped hot dogs and healthy cookies in Santa Barbara, CA.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out (S5)
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts the day off with breakfast in the garden. He amps up some classics with his World's Greatest French Toast with Praline Bacon Crumble.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out (S5)
programme.desc: Michael Symon explores the world of sweet and salty flavors with his Pretzel Fried Pork Sandwich with Hot Honey and Pickles.

programme.title: Guilty Pleasures (S2)
programme.desc: Food Network stars 'fess up and reveal their pig-tastic guilty pleasures.

programme.title: Guilty Pleasures (S2)
programme.desc: Food Network stars go all out for these sweet and salty indulgences.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's (S6)
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a brunch that's fresh from the apple orchard, with Apple Pancake Bars and more.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's (S6)
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is cooking a buzz-worthy brunch that highlights the versatility of honey.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Lauro nears the end of the Iditarod, crossing 260 miles of ice along the Bering Sea coast to reach the finish line in Nome; Marty and his friend Dave haul supplies for a cabin into the backcountry.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S15)
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the world's top ten mysterious devices, from strange, grooved discs found in a cave in China to an ancient Greek computer to an incredible crystal skull unearthed in Mexico.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It's the unsolved air piracy case in history. A man hijacks a Northwest Orient Airlines flight, demanding 4 parachutes and $200,000. He jumps off the plane with the money and is never seen again.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It's one of the most famous stories from the Bible: God sends a flood to wipe out nearly every living thing on Earth, except for Noah, his family, and the animals he saves in his fabled ark.

programme.title: Peacekeepers (S1)
programme.desc: The Chinese Peacekeepers in South Sudan are put to the test by problems inside and outside the UN Headquarters in Juba.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands that Built the World (S2)
programme.desc: In the 1950s, rival electronics companies aim to make music portable for the first time ever. What follows is a decades-long rivalry that prompts the creation of iconic products.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands that Built the World (S2)
programme.desc: A game designer named Steve Jobs starts a personal computer company in his parents' garage on his way to bringing computers mainstream.

programme.title: The Pickers (S18)
programme.desc: For Mike and Jersey Jon, the deals are flying in a North Carolina garage. Meanwhile, Danielle and Robbie uncover the celebrated history of a legendary Kentucky hotel.

programme.title: YUM Investigation
programme.desc: YUM is a detective agency that handles supernatural cases. As YUM investigates the evil spirits appearing in an old building, they discover that the spirits are created by a spirit master to haunt the residents so that the building can be vacated for redevelopment. Can the YUM investigators finally find ways to fight against the master?

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: Everything is Unknown
programme.desc: Pan Yi Ming receives his father's will stating that he must attend his funeral at home to claim the huge inheritance. When he returns home, he encounters his ex-girlfriend, her husband Hua Qi and his daughter whom he has never met. When Pan discovers that his daughter is being abused by Hua, he vows to save her but eventually fall into their trap…

programme.title: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: An old lady died after mysteriously falling off a building and her ghost appears to haunt the place. This freaked out the security guards, who invite ghostbuster Leo and his female assistant to help. In the process, Leo finds out that the old lady was killed by her son and daughter in law. To rest her soul, Leo promises to bring the couple to justice.

programme.title: The Blood Brothers
programme.desc: The friendship of three sworn brothers, Zhang, Huang and Ma ends when Ma gives in to corruption and falls for Huang's wife, eventually leading to a bloody ending.

programme.title: Twilight of the Warriors: Walled In
programme.desc: Young Chan Lok Kwun accidentally stumbles into the Kowloon Walled City while fleeing, subsequently finding purpose amid chaos and gaining wisdom. Bonding with Shin, Twelfth Master and AV, they unite under Tornado's leadership to defend against the villain, Mr Big's assaults, and pledge to protect the safe haven of the Walled City together.

programme.title: Temple of the Red Lotus
programme.desc: A young guy Wu, heads off to the Dragon Valley to meet his childhood friend Lian Chu, who was promised to be his bride. When he arrives, he finds out that the family of his bride may not be an entirely honest bunch of people. Wu wishes to take Lian Chu with him, so he has no choice but to fight against her family…

programme.title: Ambitious Kung Fu Girl
programme.desc: Si Si, a spoiled and naive rich girl with only basic kung fu training, becomes enchanted by the legends of the fearless hero Qin Ge. Determined to escape her father’s arranged marriage, she disguises herself as a man and sets out to find him, hoping to challenge Qin Ge—only to be drawn into a deadly plot within the criminal underworld.

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: On his way back to the midlands, Guo Jing meets Huang Rong and they quickly fall in love. However, Ouyang Ke proposes to marry Huang Rong at the same time, so Huang’s father sets up a duel for the two men to compete for her hand. Guo Jing finally beats Ouyang Ke to win Huang Rong back.

programme.title: Judgement of an Assassin
programme.desc: An evil clan plans a discord so as to dominate the martial arts world. Their masked assassins massacre another clan and one of the assassins is arrested and brought to trial at a tribunal of all the clans. What judgement will they make and can they uncover the truth?

programme.title: Legend of the Fox
programme.desc: A young man, Chin, believes he is an orphan, until he meets three men and learns from them that his father was a great swordsman who was killed when he was trying to dispel rumors of a wrongdoing and return a lost sword to its rightful owner. Chin seeks out the men’s help to take vengeance on the wrongful death of his father.

programme.title: Once in a Blue Moon
programme.desc: Mei Zhen’s family appears to get along but harbours deep secrets. Mei Zhen is trapped in a dead-end job with a toxic boss, her brother hides his separation and their mother grapples with lingering guilt over her husband’s departure years ago. As Mid-Autumn Festival approaches, can the family heal their wounds and find a way back to each other?

programme.title: The Chinese Boxer
programme.desc: A Japanese karate master and Diao Er, who has been expelled from his martial arts school, return to the school to kill the school master and his disciples. After the massacre, disciple Lei Ming embarks on a vigorous training regime and vows to avenge their deaths. A fatal battle is about to begin…

programme.title: Fengmen Village Horror
programme.desc: In Republican-era Jiangnan, a series of bizarre murders turns a once-tranquil village into the dreaded “Fengmen Village”. As police officer Wan Feng and reporter Li Mu join forces to investigate, their hunt for the killer becomes a desperate struggle to break the village’s deep-rooted feudal superstitions.

programme.title: Sagad Hanggang Buto
programme.desc: When his parents are killed by assassins in the family car, Banjo is adopted by the thief who took his dead parents' wallet. Raised in poverty and used to surviving with his wits, he grows up as the town's resident hoodlum.

programme.title: Hawakan mo at Pigilan ang Kahapon
programme.desc: Elsa (Liza Lorena) is rushed to the hospital for an undetermined illness. Her doctor/husband Ricardo (Dante Rivero) refuses to operate her, and requests another doctor to take his place.

programme.title: Okey Si Ma'am
programme.desc: Keempee, Donna, Paco and Lander played high school senior students each having their own personal dilemmas. Ms. Sonia (Alice Dixson), with her unorthodox way of teaching became their counselor and friend who brought out the best in her students.

programme.title: Abot Hanggang Sukdulan
programme.desc: The abduction and rape of the eldest daughter shattered the once happy Paredes household. They vowed to get justice for their daughter but changed their plan when Romano offered marriage after it was discovered that Agnes was pregnant.

programme.title: Antipolo Massacre
programme.desc: Based on a true to life story of Cecilia Masagca Antipolo Massacre is one of the most vindictive and brutal films of 1994. Possessed by an evil spirit lurked into his soul, Winifredo (Cesar Montano) brought misery and affliction to his once happy and contented family life.

programme.title: Regalo
programme.desc: Tragedy had struck newlyweds, Daniel Fernando and Sheila Ysrael, when Daniel was paralyzed. Sheila was soon seduced by Dan Fernadez, a household help.

programme.title: Indecent Professor
programme.desc: With cases of sexual harassment very much in the news, who could stop the wacky Leo Martinez from coming up with his own hilarious slant on the problem.

programme.title: Hanggang Dito na Lang
programme.desc: Hilda Koronel discovered that love, fidelity and being a perfect wife and mother were not enough to keep a husband from straying.

programme.title: Mana sa Ina
programme.desc: Fidel (Robert Arevalo) is super-strict with his daughter Frieda (Rita Avila) for fear the girl would take after her harlot of a mother Carolina (Marissa Delgado). Carolina has since abandoned her husband and daughter in favor of her lover Rufino (Orestes Ojeda).

programme.title: Lumaban Ka... Sagot Kita
programme.desc: Linette (Cherie Pie Picache) is an active student leader. She is frustrated that her boyfriend Dado (Julio Diaz) is apathetic towards the situation. But this will soon change.

programme.title: Tumayo Ka't Lumaban
programme.desc: Crisanto (Ronnie Ricketts) is a man with a mission. Circumstances have forced him and his sister to be raised by separate foster families. But now, Crisanto is determined to find his sister.

programme.title: Pretty Boy
programme.desc: Andrew E times two doubles the fun in this comedy about mistaken identities and the hilarious results. Andrew played Pretty Boy, a well-known gangster who was dressed in designer suits.

programme.title: Bad Boys Gang
programme.desc: Daang Buenaventura, head of the bad boys gang (and an avid follower of Robin Padilla, hence the similar ways and manner of his everyday lifestyle) prefers living in jail rather than enjoying the free life at the young age of 17.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.desc: The PAW Patrol is on a roll when squirrels stash acorns in Alex's treehouse causing it to fall onto Daring Danny's skateboard! // It's a switcheroo situation when a joey is separated from its mama. It's up to the pups to save a roo and the day!

programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: In a soaring new chapter in the epic story of the Man of Steel, Superman Returns to fight for truth and justice and protect the world he loves from cataclysmic destruction!

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: The chase is on. Academy Award nominee Ethan Hawke (Training Day) stars in this gritty, high-octane action thriller alongside actress/music sensation Selena Gomez and Oscar winner Jon Voight (Coming Home). Hawke stars as a former racecar driver, working against the clock and forced into a dangerous mission behind the wheel. Desperately trying to save the life of his kidnapped wife, he commandeers a fast car and its unwitting owner (Gomez), taking them on a high-speed race against time at the command of the unseen mysterious assailant (Voight) holding his wife hostage and watching his every move. To save his wife, he took the job. To keep her alive, he'll take control.

programme.title: Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: Searching for a cure to Alzheimer's disease a group of scientists on an isolated research facility become the bait as a trio of intelligent sharks fight back.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: Overworked Sandra Bullock has had enough of being millionaire Hugh Grant's lawyer, and she's about to quit!

programme.desc: Monica falls asleep during sex. Rachel argues with Tag. Ross and Joey get stranded on the roof.

programme.title: Friends S7 13
programme.desc: Phoebe becomes involved with a suicidal office worker.Rachel breaks Joey's favorite chair.Monica's beloved childhood belongings are destroyed.

programme.title: Friends S7 14
programme.desc: Rachel's 30th birthday prompts the friends to reminisce about their own 30th birthdays.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 9
programme.desc: When Leonard gets minor surgery on his nose, Sheldon has a major overreaction. Meanwhile Howard and Bernadette work on their marriage in light of Raj's parents' impending divorce.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 10
programme.desc: While Sheldon says a tearful goodbye to the final installment of Fun with Flags, Leonard, Howard and Raj search for something significant in a dead professor's research.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 4
programme.desc: Jane reveals that a list of fake Red John suspects he planted was stolen -- and the CBI team realizes that these men are in danger.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 5
programme.desc: When a prominent member of Visualize is mysteriously killed, Jane investigates in the hopes that the case will provide a clue that will lead him to Red John.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 6
programme.desc: With the final clue in hand, Jane attempts to gather the remaining Red John suspects in one place in hopes of finally revealing his identity.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 7
programme.desc: Patrick Jane finally comes face to face with Red John, the serial killer he's tracked since the madman murdered his wife and daughter ten years ago.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 6
programme.desc: The auction turns into a circus when four containers bound for Russia's Winter Games miss the boat. A waterlogged container piques everyone's interest, but can anything inside be salvaged? Plus, a Major League Baseball player gives Mo & Ty the lowdown on a state-of-the art piece of gym equipment

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 7
programme.desc: The Israelis hang ten on a sweet beach can, but one surprise item may send them off the lot in search of major dollars. Plus, Jason strikes on a container full of wood and weird gear, but will his investment land him in the gutter? And later, a mystery door may check one team into a big loss.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 5
programme.desc: Feel the endorphin rush as 20 of the World's Dumbest Thrillseekers do their thing. We've got a motorcycle crash, an out of control skydiver, even an angry bison. And one thing ties them all together - outrageous fails. With hair-raising commentary from our cast of comedians, including Michael O'Gorman, Jared Logan and Judy Gold

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 8
programme.desc: Following the shocking events at Jane's house, the Red John list is narrowed down further, and the CBI's priority is the remaining suspects.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 1
programme.desc: Former boxer Brandon Bernier and his wife Lori target the best storage units in America and then to go to any lengths to get their hands on what's stashed inside.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 2
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori go to war over a record producer's storage unit and unearth what could be a priceless piece of rock and roll history. programme.title: FBI (Season 8)
programme.desc: After a federal judge disappears, a routine investigation takes a dark turn as the team uncovers that the judge had been searching for his missing son on a secluded island on the city’s edge, where authority has crumbled.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: CIA (Season 1)
programme.desc: When a top-secret weapon is stolen in broad daylight from a U.S. defense contractor, CIA agent Colin Glass is paired with FBI agent Bill Goodman to investigate. Their new partnership gets off to a rocky start.

programme.title: Fast X
programme.desc: A terrifying threat (Jason Momoa) surfaces from the past and is determined to destroy everything and everyone Dom (Vin Diesel) loves in the family's deadliest mission ever.

programme.title: FBI (Season 8)
programme.desc: After a federal judge disappears, a routine investigation takes a dark turn as the team uncovers that the judge had been searching for his missing son on a secluded island on the city’s edge, where authority has crumbled.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: Hurry Up Tomorrow
programme.desc: A musician plagued by insomnia is pulled into an odyssey with a stranger who begins to unravel the very core of his existence.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: Amidst the effervescence of Lucas’s wedding day, Tess plays with fire as she uses Jake’s undercover investigation to get close to the man she holds responsible for her mother’s death. In this epic finale, Tess must challenge everything she thought she knew about her past to finally learn the truth about the fire that killed her mother and separated her from Lucas. Meanwhile, after spontaneously reaching out to her estranged mother in 209, Sunny continues to push boundaries in an attempt to convince herself she is cured, first sleeping with Kye, and then inviting the wolf to her door in the form of her mother – with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 8)

programme.title: Baby John is Growing Up!
programme.desc: Baby John is growing up! He learns that being little is awesome, shows his feelings & finds his lost pacifier!

programme.title: Baby John's Fun Learning Adventure!
programme.desc: Baby John's on a fun learning adventure! He plays dress-up, learns his colors & says "please" & "thank you"!

programme.title: JJ's Guide to Staying Healthy!
programme.desc: JJ learns to stay healthy! He learns to use the potty, washes his hands & goes to the doctor for a checkup!

programme.title: A Super Fun Day with Cody!
programme.desc: It's a super fun day with Cody! He has a special Hair Wash Day with Mom & goes on a dino safari with Dad!

programme.title: Kittens, Tutus & Fun Tea Parties!
programme.desc: It's CeCe Time! She gets a new kitten, dances in her ballerina tutu & hosts a fun tea party for her friends!

programme.title: JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: It's a dance party on the move! JJ sings "Wheels on the Bus," pretends to be a train & a brave firefighter!

programme.title: The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's Arpo vs. Squirrel! Arpo battles an army of squirrels & stops the pesky rodent from stealing a pie!

programme.title: When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Baby Daniel is causing mayhem! He finds Arpo's remote control & makes a huge mess all over the kitchen!

programme.title: Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: It's Twinkle's most magical moments! She becomes a train, a magic wand & brings fruits & veggies to life!

programme.title: So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: So many fun things to discover! The kids play Jack & Jill, have a tea party & make a big puddle splash!

programme.title: From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Gecko's on epic adventures, from saving Grandma at a waterfall to launching a spaceship to the moon!

programme.title: The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: The whole crew is to the rescue! They save a stranded Blue, help Kat in an out-of-control car & make a beach!

programme.title: A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: It's a fun school day with JJ! He learns the alphabet with blocks & sings about the five senses!

programme.title: Let's All Play Together with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's play together with JJ! He plays "follow the leader" with Dad, learns to share & spreads kindness!

programme.title: Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Blippi makes fun nature discoveries! He learns why islands don't float & how ants walk in a straight line!

programme.title: A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi learns how to have a healthy day! He learns about sunscreen, pizza-making & the benefits of sleep!

programme.title: How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi learns how awesome things work! He explores a firetruck, an F1 race car, a monster truck & a crane!

programme.title: Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: There are big surprises on the farm! Ella & Bee find a mysterious tortoise egg & meet new tiger twin friends!

programme.title: Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: Learn healthy habits on the farm! Ella learns to wash her hands, eat veggies & how to recycle!

programme.title: Baby John's Fun Animal Playtime!
programme.desc: It's animal playtime with Baby John! He & Manny take a fantasy bus ride & he gives his dog Bingo a checkup!

programme.title: Imagination & Problem Solving Fun!
programme.desc: Baby John uses his imagination & solves problems! He finds his lost teddy & acts out "The Three Little Pigs"!

programme.title: Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: JJ's on a sky-high adventure! He blasts off to the moon, trains as a firefighter & chases a lost balloon!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Spend a day in the life of JJ! He goes on a beach trip, brings Bingo to school & feeds baby animals!

programme.title: Little Problems, Big Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle turn little problems into big adventures! They rescue a dog & help Daddy after a hairy mishap!

programme.title: Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Orphle & Winston have the worst ideas ever! They multiply Orphle & turn Winston into a rat by mistake!

programme.title: Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn to play together! Jeff & Bubbles share blocks & Fuse learns to be a team player!

programme.title: An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: The Minibods go on an adventure! Lulu misses her bunny on a camping trip & Newt learns to ride without pedals!

programme.title: A Fun Day of Games & Construction
programme.desc: It's a day of games & fun! The crew builds a crazy golf course & has a silly sandcastle competition!

programme.title: A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: It's a big day of rescues! The crew puts out a barn fire, saves a friend from an avalanche & fixes a clock!

programme.title: Gecko's Genius Outdoor Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko has some genius outdoor fixes! He builds a water wheel & uses a bouncy castle to rescue a flying Weasel!

programme.title: A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's a busy day at the garage! Gecko fixes a fire hose, washes a muddy Baby Truck & does a quiet wheel change!

programme.title: A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: It's an ocean clean-up day! Super Shark recycles rubbish & the family builds a ball pit from recycled items!

programme.title: Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: It's a day of clever fixes! The Sharksons fix a broken backpack & make a night light to help Grub sleep!

programme.title: Let's Sing with All the Animals
programme.desc: Let's sing with the animals! JJ hosts a talent show, plays "Follow the Leader" & learns all the animal sounds!

programme.title: What Will JJ Learn Today?
programme.desc: What will JJ learn today? He learns about the days of the week, Valentine's Day & the Spanish alphabet!

programme.title: Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: Learn with Twinkle! She counts colorful balloons, learns shapes with sandcastles & plants beautiful flowers!

programme.title: Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: It's a day of fun adventures & sleepy songs! Twinkle learns animal sounds & sings a lullaby with Mr. Moon!

programme.title: Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Let's sing classic songs with KiiYii! They sing "Bingo" on the farm & "Two Little Dicky Birds"!

programme.title: When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Everything goes hilariously wrong! Robot gets stuck in jelly & Princess Cat's castle fills with bubbles!

programme.title: A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: It's a day of food, play & learning! The kids have a teddy bear picnic & learn to say hello with a wave!

programme.desc: It's a big day of fun & learning! Mia & Max go on a train ride, learn shapes & sing on the big red bus!

programme.title: Off Country - Episode 3
programme.desc: Students face the ups and downs of remote learning after COVID-19 shuts the school down; Tahlia appreciates being closer to her family in Darwin; Sunny feels more pressure about his Year 12 exams.

programme.title: Stuff the British Stole - World's Biggest Diamond
programme.desc: Marc Fennell delves into South Africa's first diamond mine and the opulent realms of London to uncover the intriguing tale of how the largest gem-quality diamond ultimately reached the hands of the British Royal family.

programme.title: Dr Ann's Secret Lives - Sea Snakes
programme.desc: Dr Ann Jones joins a team of intrepid scientists on a daring expedition off the Pilbara coast to study one of Australia's most mysterious and lethal predators: sea snakes.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Books
programme.desc: Dr Karl pulls back the cover on how books are made, following 'The Great Gatsby' on its journey from pixels to pages at the Ligare book printers in Sydney. (Final)

programme.title: ABC Late News Weekend - Episode 40
programme.desc: When you need to know what's happening turn to ABC News for coverage you can trust. Meredith Sheehan brings you the day's news by reporters in more locations across Australia, connecting communities and telling your stories.

programme.title: Offsiders - Magic Round Special from Brisbane
programme.desc: Offsiders is hitting the road and heading north to the Sunshine State for the NRL's Magic Round. Abbey Gelmi and the panel cover all the action from rugby league's big showpiece round in Brisbane.

programme.title: Island Echoes with Nornie Bero - Episode 7
programme.desc: Join acclaimed Torres Strait Islander chef and cultural ambassador Nornie Bero in Island Echoes, a vibrant journey through the breathtaking landscapes and rich traditions of her homeland.

programme.title: Field to Feast - Episode 3
programme.desc: Thanh visits one of the few producers of Australian grown sour cherries. We get to see how the fruit is traditionally used as part of a Persian cultural dish.

programme.title: ABC News Overnight - Episode 40
programme.desc: The final word on the day's top stories, with the latest news and updated information from Australia's most trusted source of independent news. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Common Cause - The Wastewater Challenge - Fiji
programme.desc: A Fijian engineer and her Australian counterpart tackle hazardous waste water across informal settlements. Their work could hold lessons with the potential to improve lives for billions around the world.

programme.title: Compass - Bring Back Joy
programme.desc: In her brief residency in East Sydney, the sculpture of mythical sex worker Joy was both celebrated and attacked. Three decades later, a group of supporters are on a mission to bring Joy home.

programme.title: Off Country - Episode 3
programme.desc: Students face the ups and downs of remote learning after COVID-19 shuts the school down; Tahlia appreciates being closer to her family in Darwin; Sunny feels more pressure about his Year 12 exams.

programme.title: I was actually there - Nicky Winmar's Stand Against Racism
programme.desc: It's a day etched into Australian sporting folklore for all the wrong reasons. A moment on a footy field where Nicky Winmar, a proud Noongar man, called out racism.

programme.title: Play On - Episode 2
programme.desc: Paul Kennedy meets the Qasimi family, who are Hazaras who escaped a suicide bombing in Pakistan before finding refuge in Australia - and football. Plus the Puoch family, a Sudanese family who live and breathe basketball.

programme.title: A Brief History of Cricket Down Under: The 80s - Rivals
programme.desc: The 1980s swept in a new professional era for international cricket players. This episode highlights the blow-ups and the great head-to-head clashes that had crowds on their feet and fans yelling at their screens.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 14
programme.desc: Hosted by award-winning journalist Pip Courtney, Landline is Australia's only national agricultural television program covering stories from Australia's rural and regional heartland.

programme.title: Insiders - Post Budget Special
programme.desc: David Speers and the panel bring you all the washup from the Federal Budget, breaking down the policies and the politics, the reaction of the Opposition, crossbench and Senate plus how voters and the public have responded.

programme.title: Offsiders - Magic Round Special from Brisbane
programme.desc: Offsiders is hitting the road and heading north to the Sunshine State for the NRL's Magic Round. Abbey Gelmi and the panel cover all the action from rugby league's big showpiece round in Brisbane.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 98
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 98
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 98
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News at Noon - Episode 98
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Kathryn Robinson brings you today's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter.

programme.title: The Matter of Facts - How Big Tech Is Making Fools of Us
programme.desc: Are you being fooled by disinformation? Hamish Macdonald examines that question as he meets with a range of participants, tech experts, nerds and disruptors to discover what's happening to our brains and belief systems.

programme.title: The Way We Wore - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this final episode, Celeste Barber tracks the ascent of Australia's fashion sector, tracing its roots from early bespoke seamstresses to the multi-billion-dollar international enterprise it is today.

programme.title: Art Works - Jen Cloher, TMAG, Thabani Tshuma
programme.desc: Namila's at Melbourne's NGV International; singer-songwriter Jen Cloher discusses their new album; cultural objects return to lutruwita for an important new exhibition at TMAG; and a performance by slam-poet Thabani Tshuma.

programme.title: End Game with Tony Armstrong - Episode 1
programme.desc: Tony Armstrong, the former AFL player turned award-winning broadcaster travels to the UK, as he starts a global search for solutions that could help drive systemic change back home.

programme.title: Alone Australia - Episode 6
programme.desc: Food is in extraordinary abundance for some survivalists, while others struggle with empty bellies and question their future in the competition.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 98
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite to Eat with Alice - John Safran
programme.desc: Author and documentarian John Safran shines a light on a Jewish staple, while Alice tries to change his mind on cauliflower.

programme.title: If you're Listening - Black Swans - Black Swans (Part 1) the Population Bomb
programme.desc: For years, many feared our planet would be stripped by the weight of a colossal population. In 2026 we've found ourselves in a world where we're not scared about having too many babies, but too few. So what happened?

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 138
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 77
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The Way We Wore - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this final episode, Celeste Barber tracks the ascent of Australia's fashion sector, tracing its roots from early bespoke seamstresses to the multi-billion-dollar international enterprise it is today.

programme.title: Out of Time
programme.desc: A Florida police chief must solve a vicious double homicide before he himself falls under suspicion.

programme.title: Pocketful of Miracles
programme.desc: A gangster from New York and his girlfriend decide to help an apple vendor who is distressed because her daughter is set to marry the son of a count assuming that she is rich.

programme.title: Legion
programme.desc: When God loses faith in mankind he sends his Legion of angels to wipe out the human race for the second time. Man's only hope lies in a group of misfits holed up in a desert diner. With the help of the Archangel Michael, these strangers must deliver a baby they soon realize is the second coming and their last chance at redemption.

programme.title: I Am Legend
programme.desc: After a biological war, Robert Neville is the last healthy human living on Earth, but he is not alone.

programme.desc: A virtuous Hong Kong Police Officer must clear his good name when the drug lord he is after frames him for the murder of a dirty cop.

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Mid-night Two
programme.desc: Yi Cheng and his friends venture into a haunted mountain that hides an ancient corpse and an eternal ghostly flame. No one who enters the mountain ever returns and at 2:30 AM, Yi Cheng’s friends vanish one by one. While searching for them in the eerie forest, Yi Cheng enters a realm of infinite reincarnation, facing a series of terrifying events…

programme.title: Mama Ghost
programme.desc: In a coastal town, a forbidden romance sparks between Rico and Sisca, and their love unleashes a malevolent spirit. As chilling deaths plague the town, past secrets are being unraveled and the town is possessed by evil and fear. Rico must defy destiny and fight against the evil spirit to save his loved one.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A woman in hospital accidentally discovers her husband’s affair. On the verge of breakdown, she begins to encounter a “stranger” who claims to also be a victim of the affair. Is this entity a figment of her imagination or a vengeful spirit? As she struggles to control her thoughts and actions, can she stop herself from hurting those around her?

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Before killing herself, she curses them to be haunted in their dreams. As the friends are killed off one by one, they must break the curse to escape their deadly fate.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A woman in hospital accidentally discovers her husband’s affair. On the verge of breakdown, she begins to encounter a “stranger” who claims to also be a victim of the affair. Is this entity a figment of her imagination or a vengeful spirit? As she struggles to control her thoughts and actions, can she stop herself from hurting those around her?

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: After the brutal murder of a mom, her children, and the family dog rocks a picture-perfect Orlando suburb—all signs point to the dad, Tony Todt.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A young, pregnant woman is found dead of an apparent suicide in Saginaw, MI, but her family and friends don't believe it. The police discover a shocking secret they never saw coming.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: Undercover agent Jerry Speziale's career shifts after a bullet; Agent Ed Newcomer probes hawk killings in California.

programme.title: City Confidential (S8)
programme.desc: When an infant's body washes up on the shores of Deer Island, Massachusetts, residents rally to find out who she is, and what happened to her. Their unprecedented solidarity gets nationwide attention.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2)
programme.desc: 20,000 Chinese children are kidnapped every year to feed a voracious baby trafficking industry. How did this happen? Who's behind it? And can anyone stop it?

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2)
programme.desc: No matter what you eat, at least one ingredient could have come from China. But with the country's thriving fake food industry, what you're eating could be poisoning you.

programme.title: Murder at the Motel
programme.desc: January 5, 2016, Baltimore, MD. Police officers respond to a report of a deceased man found at the Deluxe Plaza Motel in Northeast Baltimore.

programme.title: Sleeping with a Killer (S2)
programme.desc: When a woman is found brutally murdered in her bathtub, investigators uncover signs of a staged cleanup and a jealous rage that points to a suspect from an unexpected place.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: This articulate and boastful killer is remembered for terrifying the coastal town of Santa Cruz in the early 1970s, but his desire to kill started when he was a young child fantasising about murder.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1)
programme.desc: With the help of Det. Johnson and Det Stewart, Det. Diesburg pieces together what happened one Saturday afternoon when two young men opened fire on two teens driving down the street.

programme.title: Grade 1 Reading & Literacy
programme.desc: Learn about polite expressions and how to talk about oneself, one’s family and one’s personal experiences.

programme.title: Grade 1 Makabansa
programme.desc: Unawain ang kahalagahan ng pagkilala ng mga batayang impormasyon ng pisikal na kapaligiran sa sariling paaralan at ng mga taong bumubuo rito para sa paghubog ng kakayahan ng bawat mag-aaral.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, salitang magkatugma, salitang naglalarawan, at pagbabaybay, pati na rin ang iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento at ang pag-uugnay ng sarili sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science

programme.title: Grade 9 Math

programme.title: Grade 9 English
programme.desc: Learn the difference of biases from prejudice and the relevance and validity of information presented.

programme.title: Grade 9 Araling Panlipunan

programme.title: Grade 9 Science

programme.desc: Find out more about people, animals, plants, landforms and bodies of water, and their importance. Discover the types and effects of weather as they relate to daily activities, health and safety, and the natural objects in the sky affect one’s daily activities.

programme.title: Grade 1 Math
programme.desc: Know more about time and nonstandard units of length, mass, and capacity, as well as pictographs without scales and outcomes of an event.

programme.title: Echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismaël Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: After growing up in a squat near Paris and then in a working-class neighborhood in the 19th arrondissement, Sikou became an author and director. His work explores the fractures of identity, social class, gender and racism. Through cinema and writing, he gives a voice to those condemned to silence.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: La Grande Galerie Francophone
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Un Dimanche A La Campagne
programme.desc: A weekend together, far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. A moment out of time to get to know one another, talk of love, friendship, life. In a house open to surprises and the unexpected, between emotion and laughter, each reveals the invisible thread of their personal story...

programme.title: Top 14 Rugby Le Mag
programme.desc: Presenting the day's action in the Top 14, the French rugby championship, with summaries and highlights from the matches, players interviews and comments.

programme.title: #Investigation
programme.desc: Your rendezvous for current affairs and investigative journalism from the RTBF teams. Research, evidence, personal stories and confrontations are at the heart of the film reports about a range of subjects mainly relating to Belgian society. The key words? Independence and transparency!

programme.title: Des Racines Et Des Ailes
programme.desc: From Burgundy to the Charente-Maritime, from Mont-Saint-Michel to the Chateau de Rambouillet, ''guardian angels'' work to restore French national heritage. Who are these craftsmen and women, committed to renovating the country's finest monuments and how do they organise their projects, work that is sometimes on a titanic scale?

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Guides D'Aventures
programme.desc: He figures amongst the thirty Canadians aged under 30 considered the most influential in terms of sustainable development. Justin Fisch welcomes a group for a trip by canoe-kayak through the Everglades: a forty-kilometre journey to explore the famous wetlands.

programme.title: Le Dessous Des Cartes
programme.desc: With colossal investments, Americans and Chinese are vying for supremacy in the field of artificial intelligence. At the heart of this battle, generative AI, which produces texts, images and music, raises strategic and ethical issues. To limit the risks, some bodies, led by the EU, are trying to establish regulations.

programme.title: Le Journal De La RTBF
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Savourer
programme.desc: On the menu: maple-glazed spicy pork, maple and apple lentil salad, maple caramelised tofu, homemade maple leaf biscuit.

programme.title: Chateau !
programme.desc: The Sange Tower of the Chateau de Sully-sur-Loire, once a watchtower, offers a breathtaking view. Its exact use remains unclear, but it was probably used by soldiers. Historical research continues to uncover its mysteries.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Le Journal De La RTS
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Chateau !

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: They are invisible but essential: the dockworkers moor and undock all the merchant ships that enter and leave the ports. Sailors on land, they live on the watch, just like on a ship. In an increasingly automated world, they are an essential link in global maritime trade.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
